author: Marcus Breiden
description: Scheduled Vault Import / Export - Files Move. You don't have to. Local Filesystem <=> Vault - Import / Export — import voice memos / snippets / etc. into your inbox, export folders / tags / notes to external locations. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Marcus Breiden
manifest.description: Scheduled Vault Import / Export - Files Move. You don't have to. Local Filesystem <=> Vault - Import / Export — import voice memos / snippets / etc. into your inbox, export folders / tags / notes to external locations.
manifest.name: MiYo Hakobi

name: MiYo Hakobi
